form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of ten weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation second of 11 at Southwell All Weather January 30 over 2212m, 1.3 len behind Velvet Red with 60kg at $2.50. When resuming last campaign third of 8 at Chelmsford November 27 over 1609m, 3 len behind Gladiadora with 60.5kg at $4.60. Certainly one to consider.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Gelding back from a spell of ten weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation second of 11 at Southwell All Weather January 30 over 2212m, 1.3 len behind Velvet Red with 60kg at $2.50. When resuming last campaign third of 8 at Chelmsford November 27 over 1609m, 3 len behind Gladiadora with 60.5kg at $4.60. Certainly one to consider.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 4th of 7 at Hannover on June 9 over 2400m, 2.5 len behind Fantastico with 57kg at $5.10. Can go on to better things this campaign.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 4th of 7 at Hannover on June 9 over 2400m, 2.5 len behind Fantastico with 57kg at $5.10. Can go on to better things this campaign.

form.formComment: At debut, 9th of 12 at this track on March 29 over 1600m, in the wet; 16 len behind Hello Sweetheart with 57kg at $10.90. Didn't quite do enough on debut to raise the hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). At debut, 9th of 12 at this track on March 29 over 1600m, in the wet; 16 len behind Hello Sweetheart with 57kg at $10.90. Didn't quite do enough on debut to raise the hopes.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 4th of 7 at this track on April 13 over 2200m, 6 len behind Zauberkonig carrying 57kg at $17.40. Solid top-three proposition.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 4th of 7 at this track on April 13 over 2200m, 6 len behind Zauberkonig carrying 57kg at $17.40. Solid top-three proposition.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding by Waldpfad out of Quiaba who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Maybe later.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Four-year-old gelding by Waldpfad out of Quiaba who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Maybe later.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At very long odds at debut, 5th of 14 at Chantilly All Weather on February 20 over 1900m, 3.5 len behind Grand Chelem carrying 56kg at $70. Second-up settled back and ran on when 7th of 12 at Fontainebleau on March 6 over 2000m, slow going 8 len behind Serenissimus carrying 58kg at $28. Capable of a strong showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Having third race start. At very long odds at debut, 5th of 14 at Chantilly All Weather on February 20 over 1900m, 3.5 len behind Grand Chelem carrying 56kg at $70. Second-up settled back and ran on when 7th of 12 at Fontainebleau on March 6 over 2000m, slow going 8 len behind Serenissimus carrying 58kg at $28. Capable of a strong showing.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 8th of 11 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 11 over 2400m, 11 len behind Erling with 56.5kg at $4.90. Previously second-up 4th of 7 at Hannover in LR on May 18 over 2200m, 5.5 len behind Lady Charlotte with 58kg at $18.90. Among the top chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Second-up. First-up after three months 8th of 11 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 11 over 2400m, 11 len behind Erling with 56.5kg at $4.90. Previously second-up 4th of 7 at Hannover in LR on May 18 over 2200m, 5.5 len behind Lady Charlotte with 58kg at $18.90. Among the top chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of 13 months. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Cologne March 30 2025 over 1600m, 17 len behind Lips Vega with 58kg at $5.70. When resuming last campaign second last of 8 at Saint-Cloud in the LR March 16 2025 over 1600m, soft track; 12 len behind Flaming Stone carrying 57kg at $27. Prefer to see how she returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Resuming after a break of 13 months. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Cologne March 30 2025 over 1600m, 17 len behind Lips Vega with 58kg at $5.70. When resuming last campaign second last of 8 at Saint-Cloud in the LR March 16 2025 over 1600m, soft track; 12 len behind Flaming Stone carrying 57kg at $27. Prefer to see how she returns.

form.formComment: Was at long odds at debut, 8th of 12 at this track on March 29 over 1600m, in the wet; 16 len behind Hello Sweetheart with 53.5kg at $32.60. Requires plenty of improvement after a modest debut.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Was at long odds at debut, 8th of 12 at this track on March 29 over 1600m, in the wet; 16 len behind Hello Sweetheart with 53.5kg at $32.60. Requires plenty of improvement after a modest debut.
